channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 54/100 (building)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 54/100 (building). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Darren Jones told Mandelson he was ‘so sorry’ after sacking over Epstein ties
item.description: Darren Jones told Mandelson he was ‘so sorry’ after sacking over Epstein ties

item.title: Independent UK Politics: The real reason Farage has seized on the murder of Henry Nowak
item.description: The real reason Farage has seized on the murder of Henry Nowak

item.title: The Times: Keir Starmer may water down ‘unaffordable’ £18 billion defence boost - The Times

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK Treasury set to take control of fighter jet spending after defence ministry mishaps
